title: Fictions of Innocence: Revisiting Classic American Initiation Stories
further_info: Recommended Reading Most course readings will be made available on Moodle. Attention: This class meets on two consecutive weekdays—Tuesday (16:15–17:45) and Wednesday (14:15–15:45)—every other week. Students are expected to attend both sessions during the weeks in which the class meets. The first meetings will take place on April 21 and April 22.
